objective: Summarize a domain's backlink profile — read-only, no changes.

data.text: Give me a quick read-only summary of damorelaw.com's backlink profile.

data.reply: damorelaw.com backlink profile (read-only): 342 referring domains and 5,210 total backlinks, with a spam score of 4%. Nothing was changed.

toolOutputs.output: damorelaw.com backlinks summary: referring_domains 342; backlinks 5210; backlinks_spam_score 4

finalAnswerText: damorelaw.com backlink profile (read-only): 342 referring domains and 5,210 total backlinks, with a spam score of 4%. Nothing was changed.
